title: Kindiki calls for national unity, warns against tribal politics
body: Deputy President Kithure Kindiki, speaking at the opening of the Kithimani Land Registry in Yatta, Machakos County, said Kenya belongs to all its citizens and warned leaders against stoking tribal politics for personal gain, urging the country to reject division along ethnic lines.
aiSummary: DP Kindiki urges national unity, warns against tribal politics at a Machakos event.

title: Kalonzo launches public fundraising drive for 2027 bid
body: Kalonzo Musyoka launched a public fundraising campaign under the banner "#KomboaKenya", asking Kenyans to contribute via Paybill toward his movement, saying the effort is meant to reduce reliance on wealthy financiers ahead of the 2027 election.
aiSummary: Kalonzo opens public Paybill fundraiser for his 2027 campaign movement.

title: Sifuna's Western tour builds momentum for a 2027 bid
body: Nairobi Senator Edwin Sifuna toured Trans Nzoia and Bungoma for back-to-back Linda Mwananchi rallies, drawing a growing coalition of regional leaders behind him, including Kisii Senator Richard Onyonka, who had previously backed a rival's presidential bid.
aiSummary: Sifuna's Western Kenya rallies draw a growing coalition ahead of a possible 2027 run.

title: Sifuna commits to a 47-county listening tour before deciding on 2027
body: Edwin Sifuna said he will take his Linda Mwananchi movement to all 47 counties to gauge its national appeal before deciding whether to contest the presidency in 2027, while thanking Senate leadership and colleagues for their cooperation during his time as Deputy Senate Minority Whip.
aiSummary: Sifuna pledges a nationwide 47-county tour ahead of a 2027 decision.
